name: Referrals — page renders honestly (no crash, no fabricated referral data)

planSteps.description: Wait up to 12 seconds for the page to render
The page renders without an error boundary, without a blank white screen, without a 404 message, and without visible raw JavaScript stack traces

If the user has no wallet connected, the page shows a clear connect-wallet prompt or an honest empty state — it must NOT show fabricated referral counts, invented earning amounts, or fake referred-user lists
Any 'Rewards' or 'Earnings' displays show either $0/0 DBC/N/A (honest empty state) or come with a clearly visible 'demo data' / 'example' label
